# CWE-420 positive: unprotected alternate debug route (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-420-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func MountBillingAPI(db *sql.DB) {
	protected := requireSession(http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id, total FROM invoices WHERE tenant_id = ?", sessionTenant(r))
		defer rows.Close()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	}))
	http.Handle("/api/invoices", protected)
	http.HandleFunc("/debug/sqltrace", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		_, _ = db.Exec("PRAGMA query_only = 0")
		w.Write([]byte("trace on for " + r.URL.Query().Get("tenant")))
	})
}

func requireSession(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) { next.ServeHTTP(w, r) })
}

func sessionTenant(r *http.Request) string { return r.Header.Get("X-Tenant") }
